title: The Crew Searches for Proof
description: On pages 13, 14, 15, 16, this part focuses on the salvage monkeys appear. Masira and the Salvage King crew enter the story as the Straw Hats encounter the rough culture around shipwrecks and treasure hunting.
scene: This scene belongs to the The Salvage Monkeys Appear sequence. The important beat is the dialogue and action around Luffy, Narrator, Nami, Usopp, Sanji.

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: Can happen in reality. -Physicist Willy Gallon-

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: A dream! Yes, I must be dreaming!

dialogue.speaker: Luffy
dialogue.text: As if that'd work with these waves!

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: And then slowly open them again,

dialogue.speaker: Nico Robin
dialogue.text: And look... It's a calm, beautiful momi-

dialogue.speaker: Sanji
dialogue.text: Don't throw it at me, you idiot!

summary: Masira and the Salvage King crew enter the story as the Straw Hats encounter the rough culture around shipwrecks and treasure hunting.
